perks.summary: create a notebook on the server (POST /api/notebooks) — remote mutation
ingest a source from a URL or raw text into a notebook (POST /api/sources) — remote mutation
list sources, optionally filtered by notebook (GET /api/sources, read-only)
create a chat session inside a notebook (POST /api/chat/sessions) — remote mutation
send a message to a chat session with source/note context (POST /api/chat/execute) — remote mutation
search the knowledge base, full-text or vector (POST /api/search, read-only)
ask a question and get an AI answer from the knowledge base (POST /api/search/ask/simple, read-only)
